pattern: Greedily assign the largest valid digit to each '?' position based on the valid ranges for hours and minutes.
hints: Handle each of the four digit positions independently: positions 0, 1, 3, 4 (skipping the colon at index 2).
For the tens of hours (index 0): if index 1 is unknown use '1', otherwise the max digit depends on whether index 1 is 0-1 (allows '1') or 2-9 (must use '0').
For minutes (index 3 and 4), greedy is straightforward: tens max is '5', units max is '9'.

edge_inputs.description: only hour tens unknown with unit 0
only hour tens unknown with unit 3 forcing tens to 0
hour unit is 2 — tens must be 0 not 1
hour unit known as 0 — tens can be 1
